titleStmt.title: SII 41.224: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 224. (A.R. No. 443 of 1905.) Tiruttaṇi, Tiruttani Taluk, Chittoor District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Vijayaraghava-Perumal temple at Tiruttaṇi.

p.hi: Vijayanagar, Sadāśivadēva Mahārāya, Śaka 1471, Saumya, Makara, Purva 11, Rōhiṇi, Monday = 1549, Dec. 31.

summary.p: Gift of the income (lakkam) of a village by the mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāja-Chinna Timmayadēva-Mahārāyar to the temple of Perumāḷ Vīrarāgavat tambirāṉ in Tiruttaṇi in Taṇigai-nāḍu a subdivision of Kunṟavarttana-kōṭṭam. The gift village Viḷakkanēri-kuppam was included in Taṇigai-nāḍu in Nārayaṇapura-paṟṟu in Chandragiri-rājya which was the sīrmai of the donor.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . manmahāmaṇdhaleśvaraṉ Irācarājaparameśvaraṉ Aṣṭatikku maṉobhayaṅkaraṉ tulakkataḷavipāṭaṉ tulakkamoharam tavittāṉ Iḻantiṟai koṇṭāṉ
yēkāṅka vīraviṉotaṉ Ariyarāya vipāṭaṉ pāṣaikku tappuvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ kaṇṭaṉāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭaṉāṭu kuṭātaṉ Emmaṇṭalamun tiṟaikoṇṭa pūrva tekṣaṇa
paccima Uttara camuttirātipati śrīvirappiṟutāpa catāśivateva mahārāyar prativirājiyam paṇṇi Aruḷā niṉṟa cakābdam 1000 4 100 7 10 1kku mel cellā niṉṟa saumyasamvaṟcarattu
makaraṉāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu Ekādaciyum rokiṇiyum peṟṟa comavārattuṉāḷ ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattil śrīmaṉmakāmaṇṭalecura rāmarācu ciṉṉatimmayateva
makārācar nammiṭacirmaiyāṉa cantirakiri rācciyattil ṉārāyaṇapura paṟṟil kuṉṟavaṟtaṉa koṭṭattu taṇikai ṉāṭṭil tiruttaṇi Ellai cūḻnta kiṟāmam viḷakkanerikuppam tiruttaṇiyal
perumāḷ virarākavattemperumāṉukku taṉma cātaṉam paṇṇikuṭuttapaṭi tirukkovilukku tiruvārādhanattukku viḷakkaneri kuppattil kaṇṭalakkam Uṇṭāṉatu
koṇṭu cantiṟātittavaraiyum naṭatta kaṭavatākavum Inta taṉmam ciṉṉatimmaya tevamahārācayaṉukku puṇyamāka cāluvatimmarācar ceyvitta taṉmam yinta taṟmam ceṟn(t)tār
Āyiravar naṭattakaṭavarākavum yippaṭikku yinta taṟmaśāsanam Eḻutinamaikku yūrkaṇakku taṇikaināṭṭu veḷār Inta taṟumam yātoruvar Akitam paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ
keṅkaikaraiyil brahmaatti goatti paṇṇina toṣattile povarkaḷ
Digital edition of SII 41.224 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
